runtimeInfo.summary: Connected to local project store v1.

summary.en: Fixture-backed project root for the BE-PR1 API server skeleton.
summary.zh-CN: 用于 BE-PR1 API server skeleton 的 fixture 项目根数据。

summary.en: Baseline manuscript snapshot captured before compare and review work started.
summary.zh-CN: 在 compare 与 review 工作开始前采集的基线稿快照。

summary.en: Checkpointed station chapter before the latest review pass.
summary.zh-CN: 最新复审之前的站台章节 checkpoint。

summary.en: The bargain remains public while the ledger stays unread.
summary.zh-CN: 交易维持在公开视线内，账本仍未被翻开。

scenes.proseDraft: Ren lets the rain hide how tightly he is counting seconds while Mei prices the ledger in full view of the platform witness.

summary.en: Full manuscript packet for editorial review with compare and trace context attached.
summary.zh-CN: 用于编辑审阅的完整稿件包，附带 compare 与 trace 上下文。

book-signal-arc.title: Signal Arc Review Packet
book-signal-arc.summary: Fixture review packet exported from the baseline checkpoint.
book-signal-arc.content:
# Signal Arc Review Packet

Fixture export artifact content.

summary.en: A lower-conflict branch that trims the closing pressure without removing the handoff logic.
summary.zh-CN: 一个更低冲突的实验稿，收束尾声压力，但不移除交接逻辑。

rationale.en: Test a low-conflict landing where the station scenes release tension earlier.
rationale.zh-CN: 测试一个低冲突收束版本，让站台段落更早放下压力。

summary.en: The station chapter resolves with a gentler public negotiation and cleaner release.
summary.zh-CN: 站台章节以更克制的公开谈判和更干净的离场收束。

summary.en: The platform bargain stays visible, but the scene lands with less threat.
summary.zh-CN: 站台交易仍在众目睽睽下进行，但收束威胁感更轻。

proseDraft.en: Ren keeps the ledger in sight while Mei lets the platform bargain land softer.
proseDraft.zh-CN: 任仍把账本放在视线里，但梅让站台交易收得更轻。

summary.en: Re-cut the same chapter through order, density, and assembly pressure without leaving the workbench.
summary.zh-CN: 在公共压力与隐秘筹码之间重新编排同一章的节奏线。

goal.en: Keep the platform bargain public while the ledger stays unread.
goal.zh-CN: 让站台交易保持公开可见，同时不让账本被翻开。

summary.en: Ren has to lock the bargain before the platform witness turns the ledger into public leverage.
summary.zh-CN: Ren 必须在站台目击者把账本变成公开筹码之前锁定交易。

purpose.en: Push the ledger bargain into a public stalemate without opening the ledger.
purpose.zh-CN: 在不翻开账本的前提下，把交易推进到公开可见的僵局。

conflict.en: Ren needs leverage, Mei needs a higher price, and the witness keeps both of them public.
conflict.zh-CN: Ren 需要筹码，美伊需要更高代价，站务员让一切都不能失控。

reveal.en: The courier signal stays legible only to Ren.
reveal.zh-CN: 信使暗号仍只对 Ren 可读。

summary.en: A crowd bottleneck should slow the exit without resolving who controls the courier line.
summary.zh-CN: 人潮阻塞会拖慢离场，但不会解决谁掌控信使线索。

purpose.en: Hold the exit timing back so the chapter can keep pressure for one more scene.
purpose.zh-CN: 继续压住离场节拍，让压力留到下一场。

conflict.en: The crowd slows everyone down, but Ren still cannot afford to lose initiative.
conflict.zh-CN: 拥堵拖慢节奏，但 Ren 不能失去主动权。

reveal.en: Witness pressure carries inward from the platform.
reveal.zh-CN: 目击者压力从月台延伸到室内。

summary.en: The alias stays offstage while Mei tests whether Ren will trade certainty for speed.
summary.zh-CN: 别名继续留在台外，Mei 试探 Ren 是否会拿确定性交换速度。

purpose.en: Bring speed and certainty into the same beat without letting the alias surface.
purpose.zh-CN: 把“速度”和“确定性”的交换压到同一镜头里。

conflict.en: Ren wants speed, Mei wants commitment first.
conflict.zh-CN: Ren 想加速离场，美伊要逼他先表态。

reveal.en: The alias still has not crossed into public knowledge.
reveal.zh-CN: 化名仍然没有进入公开层。

summary.en: The chapter still needs a final bell placement that does not collapse the witness pressure too early.
summary.zh-CN: 本章仍需要一个不会过早压垮目击者压力的终局钟声位置。

purpose.en: Find an exit bell cue that preserves witness pressure to the final beat.
purpose.zh-CN: 为本章找到不破坏见证压力的离场铃点。

conflict.en: If the bell lands too early, the chapter’s confrontation loses pressure.
conflict.zh-CN: 铃声一旦太早落下，章节的对峙压力就会塌掉。

reveal.en: The ending still lacks a safe transition into motion.
reveal.zh-CN: 终局节拍仍缺一个安全的过渡。

chapterNotes.en: Witness scrutiny belongs in the auxiliary context, not the stage copy.
chapterNotes.zh-CN: 目击者压力放在辅助上下文，不放进主舞台文案。

detail.en: The exit bell still lands too early and drains confrontation pressure before the chapter closes.
detail.zh-CN: 离场铃点仍然过早，会在章节收束前耗掉对峙压力。

detail.en: Carry platform witness pressure into the concourse instead of resolving it on the platform.
detail.zh-CN: 让站台目击压力延续到候车厅，而不是在月台上耗尽。

summary.en: Stress-test the same chapter dataset across quieter handoff scenes and broader spatial transitions.
summary.zh-CN: 用更开阔的场景切换验证同一份 chapter dataset 的多视图复用。

goal.en: Keep the first handoff reversible long enough for the betrayal line to survive.
goal.zh-CN: 让第一次交接保持可撤回，直到背叛线能够继续存活。

summary.en: The first handoff stays tentative so the betrayal beat can remain deferred.
summary.zh-CN: 第一次交接保持试探性，让背叛节拍继续延后。

purpose.en: Keep the first handoff reversible so later betrayal pressure survives.
purpose.zh-CN: 把第一次交接压在“仍可撤回”的边缘上。

conflict.en: Every move risks exposing the package owner too early.
conflict.zh-CN: 任何一步都可能让货物归属暴露得太早。

reveal.en: The betrayal line still lives in gesture, not explicit dialogue.
reveal.zh-CN: 背叛线仍只在动作里出现，不在对白里落明。

chapterNotes.en: Keep alternate views pointed at the same chapter identity.
chapterNotes.zh-CN: 不同视图仍然指向同一个章节身份。

detail.en: The transition from the warehouse handoff to the exit sequence is still too abrupt.
detail.zh-CN: 第一场和最后一场之间的承接张力还不够顺。

detail.en: Let Warehouse Bridge hesitation flow straight into Canal Watch instead of inventing a new suspense thread.
detail.zh-CN: 把仓桥交接的迟疑直接传给运河哨位，而不是另起一条疑心线。

summary.en: Courier-side negotiator who keeps the ledger closed while trying to buy time in public.
summary.zh-CN: 站在信使一侧的谈判者，在公开压力里一边拖时间，一边坚持账本不能被翻开。

value.zh-CN: 信使谈判者

value.en: Lock the bargain before witnesses harden the price.
value.zh-CN: 在目击者抬高代价前锁定交易。

excerpt.en: Ren holds the line on the platform and refuses to turn the ledger into a public prop.
excerpt.zh-CN: Ren 在月台上顶住局面，拒绝把账本变成公开道具。

summary.en: Ren needs Mei’s timing, but refuses the terms that would make the ledger public.
summary.zh-CN: Ren 需要 Mei 给出时机，但拒绝接受会让账本公开的条件。

summary.en: Ren may enter run context when he is in cast or explicitly linked to a proposal.
summary.zh-CN: 当 Ren 位于登场阵容或被提案显式引用时，可以进入运行上下文。

summary.en: Include selected Ren facts when he is active in the scene cast.
summary.zh-CN: 当 Ren 位于场景登场阵容时纳入筛选事实。

summary.en: Attach only the facts needed to evaluate a Ren-facing variant.
summary.zh-CN: 仅附带评估 Ren 相关变体所需事实。

guardrailLabel.en: Do not expose private courier signal notes.
guardrailLabel.zh-CN: 不要暴露信使暗号私密备注。

summary.en: Private decoding material stays outside shared scene context.
summary.zh-CN: 私密解码材料不进入共享场景上下文。

warnings.en: Public witness pressure can flip Ren’s leverage into liability if the ledger slips open.
warnings.zh-CN: 一旦账本松动，公开目击压力会把 Ren 的筹码反转成负担。

summary.en: Counterparty who keeps raising the visible cost until Ren gives her a usable commitment.
summary.zh-CN: 不断抬高公开代价的对手，直到 Ren 给出她能用的承诺。

value.zh-CN: 对手方斡旋者

summary.en: Mei keeps widening the public price so Ren’s private timing stops being enough.
summary.zh-CN: Mei 不断抬高公开代价，让 Ren 的私下时机不再足够。

summary.en: Mei enters context as visible counter-pressure for bargaining beats.
summary.zh-CN: Mei 作为谈判节拍的可见对抗压力进入上下文。

summary.en: Include Mei when the scene needs public bargaining pressure.
summary.zh-CN: 场景需要公开谈判压力时纳入 Mei。

summary.en: Open platform where every hesitation turns into public leverage and witness pressure.
summary.zh-CN: 一个公开暴露的站台，任何犹豫都会被放大成目击压力和公开筹码。

value.zh-CN: 交通月台
人群可见性会让秘密变贵。

summary.en: The platform may provide staging excerpts without copying the full location profile.
summary.zh-CN: 月台可提供调度摘录，但不复制完整地点档案。

summary.en: Attach location cues when the scene is staged on the platform.
summary.zh-CN: 场景发生在月台时附带地点线索。

summary.en: Core constraint that keeps the exchange from collapsing into immediate public proof.
summary.zh-CN: 一条核心约束，用来阻止这场交换立刻坍塌成公开证据。

summary.en: The ledger rule can enter continuity review, but spoiler proof stays excluded.
summary.zh-CN: 账本规则可进入连续性审阅，但剧透证明保持排除。

summary.en: Use a terse guardrail when a run depends on the closed-ledger rule.
summary.zh-CN: 运行依赖账本关闭规则时只使用简短护栏。

guardrailLabel.en: Never include proof contents in context packets.
guardrailLabel.zh-CN: 不要在上下文包中包含证明内容。

summary.en: Proof contents remain excluded from run context.
summary.zh-CN: 证明内容保持排除，不进入运行上下文。

summary.en: Timing rule that decides when the exit can move without draining witness pressure too early.
summary.zh-CN: 一条时序规则，用来决定何时可以离场，又不至于过早抽干目击压力。

summary.en: The bell rule is editor-only until the chapter ending is resolved.
summary.zh-CN: 铃点规则在章节结尾解决前仅供编辑使用。

summary.en: Redact the exact ending cue while preserving the timing warning count.
summary.zh-CN: 隐藏精确结尾提示，仅保留时序警告计数。

summary.en: Narrow exchange point where queue pressure becomes visible.
summary.zh-CN: 一个让队列压力显形的狭窄交换节点。

summary.en: Courier-side negotiator who keeps the ledger closed while trying to buy time in public.
summary.zh-CN: 站在信使一侧的谈判者，在公开压力里一边拖时间，一边坚持账本不能被翻开。

value.zh-CN: 信使谈判者

value.zh-CN: 在目击者抬高代价前锁定交易。

summary.en: Open platform where every hesitation turns into public leverage and witness pressure.
summary.zh-CN: 一个公开暴露的站台，任何犹豫都会被放大成目击压力和公开筹码。

value.zh-CN: 交通月台
人群可见性会让秘密变贵。

summary.en: The platform may provide staging excerpts without copying the full location profile.
summary.zh-CN: 月台可提供调度摘录，但不复制完整地点档案。

summary.en: Attach location cues when the scene is staged on the platform.
summary.zh-CN: 场景发生在月台时附带地点线索。

summary.en: Core constraint that keeps the exchange from collapsing into immediate public proof.
summary.zh-CN: 一条核心约束，用来阻止这场交换立刻坍塌成公开证据。

summary.en: The ledger rule can enter continuity review, but spoiler proof stays excluded.
summary.zh-CN: 账本规则可进入连续性审阅，但剧透证明保持排除。

summary.en: Use a terse guardrail when a run depends on the closed-ledger rule.
summary.zh-CN: 运行依赖账本关闭规则时只使用简短护栏。

guardrailLabel.en: Never include proof contents in context packets.
guardrailLabel.zh-CN: 不要在上下文包中包含证明内容。

summary.en: Proof contents remain excluded from run context.
summary.zh-CN: 证明内容保持排除，不进入运行上下文。

summary.en: Timing rule that decides when the exit can move without draining witness pressure too early.
summary.zh-CN: 一条时序规则，用来决定何时可以离场，又不至于过早抽干目击压力。

summary.en: The bell rule is editor-only until the chapter ending is resolved.
summary.zh-CN: 铃点规则在章节结尾解决前仅供编辑使用。

summary.en: Redact the exact ending cue while preserving the timing warning count.
summary.zh-CN: 隐藏精确结尾提示，仅保留时序警告计数。

summary.en: Narrow exchange point where queue pressure becomes visible.
summary.zh-CN: 一个让队列压力显形的狭窄交换节点。

summary.en: Courier-side negotiator who keeps the ledger closed while trying to buy time in public.
summary.zh-CN: 站在信使一侧的谈判者，在公开压力里一边拖时间，一边坚持账本不能被翻开。

value.zh-CN: 信使谈判者

value.en: Lock the bargain before witnesses harden the price.
value.zh-CN: 在目击者抬高代价前锁定交易。

excerpt.en: Ren holds the line on the platform and refuses to turn the ledger into a public prop.
excerpt.zh-CN: Ren 在月台上顶住局面，拒绝把账本变成公开道具。

summary.en: Ren needs Mei’s timing, but refuses the terms that would make the ledger public.
summary.zh-CN: Ren 需要 Mei 给出时机，但拒绝接受会让账本公开的条件。

summary.en: Ren may enter run context when he is in cast or explicitly linked to a proposal.
summary.zh-CN: 当 Ren 位于登场阵容或被提案显式引用时，可以进入运行上下文。

summary.en: Include selected Ren facts when he is active in the scene cast.
summary.zh-CN: 当 Ren 位于场景登场阵容时纳入筛选事实。

summary.en: Attach only the facts needed to evaluate a Ren-facing variant.
summary.zh-CN: 仅附带评估 Ren 相关变体所需事实。

guardrailLabel.en: Do not expose private courier signal notes.
guardrailLabel.zh-CN: 不要暴露信使暗号私密备注。

summary.en: Private decoding material stays outside shared scene context.
summary.zh-CN: 私密解码材料不进入共享场景上下文。

warnings.en: Public witness pressure can flip Ren’s leverage into liability if the ledger slips open.
warnings.zh-CN: 一旦账本松动，公开目击压力会把 Ren 的筹码反转成负担。

summary.en: Counterparty who keeps raising the visible cost until Ren gives her a usable commitment.
summary.zh-CN: 不断抬高公开代价的对手，直到 Ren 给出她能用的承诺。

value.zh-CN: 对手方斡旋者

summary.en: Mei keeps widening the public price so Ren’s private timing stops being enough.
summary.zh-CN: Mei 不断抬高公开代价，让 Ren 的私下时机不再足够。

summary.en: Mei enters context as visible counter-pressure for bargaining beats.
summary.zh-CN: Mei 作为谈判节拍的可见对抗压力进入上下文。

summary.en: Include Mei when the scene needs public bargaining pressure.
summary.zh-CN: 场景需要公开谈判压力时纳入 Mei。

workspace.title: Midnight Platform
workspace.objective: Lock the bargain before the witness can turn the ledger into public leverage.

identity.title: Midnight Platform
identity.timeboxLabel: Near midnight, one train window left
identity.summary: The platform scene keeps every negotiation beat public.

objective.externalGoal: Close the bargain without opening the ledger.
objective.emotionalGoal: Keep Ren visibly controlled under witness pressure.
objective.successSignal: The witness sees a bargain, but not the ledger contents.
objective.failureCost: The courier signal becomes public leverage.

cast.name: Ren Voss
cast.agenda: Hold the ledger line and buy time.

cast.name: Mei Arden
cast.agenda: Force a visible commitment before the crowd disperses.

constraints.label: Ledger stays shut
constraints.summary: No beat can expose the ledger contents in public.

knowledgeBoundaries.label: Courier signal meaning
knowledgeBoundaries.summary: Only Ren can decode the private courier signal.

presetOptions.label: Tight Stakes
presetOptions.summary: Bias toward visible negotiation and compressed pacing.

objective.goal: Keep the platform bargain public without letting the ledger open.

beats.title: Open with witness pressure
beats.summary: Witness pressure establishes the public terms.

beats.title: Force the bargain turn
beats.summary: Proposal set is waiting for editorial review.

proposals.title: Raise the price in public
proposals.summary: Mei escalates the bargain while the witness stays close enough to hear.

affects.label: Beat summary
affects.deltaSummary: More visible escalation before the train departs.

risks.message: Too much escalation could expose the courier signal.

acceptedSummary.sceneSummary: The platform bargain remains public while Ren keeps the ledger unread.

acceptedFacts.label: Ledger remains closed
acceptedFacts.value: No public beat opens the ledger.

prose.proseDraft: Ren lets the rain hide the count in his head while Mei keeps every term loud enough for the witness to hear.
prose.latestDiffSummary: Tightened public bargaining beats and reduced repeated witness narration.

acceptedFacts.label: Ledger remains closed
acceptedFacts.value: The witness never sees the ledger opened.

privateInfoGuard.summary: Keep private courier knowledge out of public beats.

items.label: Courier signal meaning
items.summary: Only Ren can decode the courier signal.

boundaries.label: Courier signal contents
boundaries.summary: Mei sees pressure, not the actual code.

localState.label: Weather
localState.value: Rain keeps the platform noisy and visible.

overrides.label: Closing beat guard
overrides.summary: Do not resolve the witness pressure before the bell cue.

checkpoints.label: PR11 baseline
checkpoints.summary: Current compare anchor for the scene.

acceptanceTimeline.title: Accepted draft delta
acceptanceTimeline.detail: Public bargaining pressure increased without exposing the ledger.

patchCandidates.summary: Tighten witness-facing dialogue before the final beat.

events.title: Review waiting
events.detail: Run review is waiting on the proposal set.

trace.title: Ledger guard

checks.detail: The bell cue still risks collapsing witness pressure too early.

items.title: Closing bell lands too soon

patchPreview.label: Platform pressure patch

patchPreview.sceneSummary: Witness pressure stays public while Ren holds the ledger line.

acceptedFacts.label: Ledger remains closed
acceptedFacts.value: No public beat opens the ledger.

changes.label: Sharpen public price
changes.detail: Move Mei’s strongest demand earlier in the beat rail.

workspace.title: Concourse Delay
workspace.objective: Hold the crowd bottleneck long enough to keep platform pressure alive.

identity.title: Concourse Delay
identity.summary: A crowd-bound transition scene that delays the exit without resolving who controls the courier line.

objective.externalGoal: Delay the exit without giving up the courier advantage.
objective.emotionalGoal: Let Mei keep control without showing panic.
objective.successSignal: The crowd slows the move and the witness pressure survives.
objective.failureCost: The handoff escapes the chapter before the pressure lands.

cast.name: Mei Arden
cast.agenda: Hold the crowd between Ren and the gate.

cast.name: Ren Voss
cast.agenda: Slip through before the delay hardens.

constraints.label: Do not settle courier ownership
constraints.summary: No one proves who controls the courier line here.

knowledgeBoundaries.label: Courier-line owner

presetOptions.summary: Keep the scene light enough for parity coverage while preserving scene-shape integrity.

objective.goal: Use the bottleneck to delay motion without turning the chapter private.

items.recommendation: Tie the bell to the last visible concession instead of an empty timing slot.

workspace.title: Warehouse Bridge
workspace.objective: Keep the first handoff reversible so the betrayal line can stay deferred.

identity.title: Warehouse Bridge
identity.summary: The first waterfront handoff stays deliberately reversible.

objective.externalGoal: Move the package without fixing the betrayal line too early.
objective.emotionalGoal: Hold hesitation and trust pressure together.
objective.failureCost: Ownership becomes explicit before the story is ready.

run.title: Midnight platform scene run
run.summary: Planner and writer output are ready for editorial review.

runtimeSummary.nextActionLabel: Review proposals before any retry or prose continuation.

events.summary: Narrative runtime started the scene run.

bookPremise.en: Fixture-backed project root for the BE-PR1 API server skeleton.
bookPremise.zh-CN: 用于 BE-PR1 API server skeleton 的 fixture 项目根数据。

chapterGoal.en: Re-cut the same chapter through order, density, and assembly pressure without leaving the workbench.
chapterGoal.zh-CN: 在公共压力与隐秘筹码之间重新编排同一章的节奏线。

sceneObjective.en: Lock the bargain before the witness can turn the ledger into public leverage.
sceneObjective.zh-CN: Lock the bargain before the witness can turn the ledger into public leverage.

sceneSetup.en: The platform scene keeps every negotiation beat public.
sceneSetup.zh-CN: The platform scene keeps every negotiation beat public.

currentState.en: The platform bargain remains public while Ren keeps the ledger unread.
currentState.zh-CN: The platform bargain remains public while Ren keeps the ledger unread.

castSummary.en: Ren Voss (POV negotiator): Hold the ledger line and buy time.; Mei Arden (Counterparty): Force a visible commitment before the crowd disperses.
castSummary.zh-CN: Ren Voss (POV negotiator): Hold the ledger line and buy time.; Mei Arden (Counterparty): Force a visible commitment before the crowd disperses.

locationSummary.en: Midnight Platform: Open platform where every hesitation turns into public leverage and witness pressure.
locationSummary.zh-CN: Midnight Platform: Open platform where every hesitation turns into public leverage and witness pressure.

styleInstruction.en: POV Midnight Platform should stay compressed and public leverage rising.; Preset: Bias toward visible negotiation and compressed pacing.
styleInstruction.zh-CN: POV Midnight Platform should stay compressed and public leverage rising.; Preset: Bias toward visible negotiation and compressed pacing.

visibilityExplanation.en: 6 assets were included, 0 were excluded, and 1 stayed redacted.
visibilityExplanation.zh-CN: 已纳入 6 项资产，排除 0 项，遮蔽 1 项。

budgetSummary.en: Budget 1600 tokens across 3 canon anchors and 6 included assets.
budgetSummary.zh-CN: 预算 1600 tokens，覆盖 3 条正典锚点与 6 项已纳入资产。

summary.en: Signal Arc premise, Signals in Rain chapter goal, and the live scene objective were packed together.
summary.zh-CN: 已整理 信号弧线 的书级 premise、雨中信号 的章节目标与当前场景目标。

summary.en: Accepted canon facts and current scene state remain the guardrails for planning and prose.
summary.zh-CN: 已接受的正典事实与当前场景状态继续作为规划和正文的护栏。

summary.en: Cast, location, constraints, and review-only rules were filtered through visibility policy before inclusion.
summary.zh-CN: 登场角色、地点、约束与仅供评审的规则会先经过可见性策略过滤，再决定是否纳入。

value.en: Lock the bargain before the witness can turn the ledger into public leverage.
value.zh-CN: Lock the bargain before the witness can turn the ledger into public leverage.

value.en: The platform bargain remains public while Ren keeps the ledger unread.
value.zh-CN: The platform bargain remains public while Ren keeps the ledger unread.

value.en: No public beat opens the ledger.
value.zh-CN: No public beat opens the ledger.

reason.en: Courier-side negotiator who keeps the ledger closed while trying to buy time in public. Public line: Ren will stall in public before he lets the ledger open.; Role: Courier negotiator
reason.zh-CN: Courier-side negotiator who keeps the ledger closed while trying to buy time in public. Public line: Ren will stall in public before he lets the ledger open.; Role: Courier negotiator

reason.en: Counterparty who keeps raising the visible cost until Ren gives her a usable commitment. Role: Counterparty broker
reason.zh-CN: Counterparty who keeps raising the visible cost until Ren gives her a usable commitment. Role: Counterparty broker

reason.en: Open platform where every hesitation turns into public leverage and witness pressure. Type: Transit platform; Pressure: Crowd visibility makes secrets expensive.
reason.zh-CN: Open platform where every hesitation turns into public leverage and witness pressure. Type: Transit platform; Pressure: Crowd visibility makes secrets expensive.

reason.en: A sealed object whose proof value would end the bargaining game the moment it becomes public. Outer shell: Most witnesses only know the ledger as a sealed object that should not be opened publicly.
reason.zh-CN: A sealed object whose proof value would end the bargaining game the moment it becomes public. Outer shell: Most witnesses only know the ledger as a sealed object that should not be opened publicly.

reason.en: Lore-level truth that no witnessed bargain survives once direct proof is placed in public view. Surface rule: As long as witnesses remain, the bargain must stay one step away from proof.
reason.zh-CN: Lore-level truth that no witnessed bargain survives once direct proof is placed in public view. Surface rule: As long as witnesses remain, the bargain must stay one step away from proof.

reason.en: The organization trying to keep witness pressure survivable while preserving the closed-ledger line. Public posture: The network prefers delay over exposure when witness pressure spikes.
reason.zh-CN: The organization trying to keep witness pressure survivable while preserving the closed-ledger line. Public posture: The network prefers delay over exposure when witness pressure spikes.

reason.en: private facts for Ren Voss stay out of the shared context packet.
reason.zh-CN: 任·沃斯 的 private 级事实不会进入共享上下文包。

reason.en: Private decoding material stays outside shared scene context.
reason.zh-CN: 私密解码材料不进入共享场景上下文。

reason.en: spoiler facts for Closed Ledger stay out of the shared context packet.
reason.zh-CN: 闭合账本 的 spoiler 级事实不会进入共享上下文包。

reason.en: Spoiler proof contents remain excluded from run context.
reason.zh-CN: 剧透级证明内容保持排除，不进入运行上下文。

reason.en: Departure Bell Timing stays redacted; only the guardrail and warning count remain visible.
reason.zh-CN: 发车铃时序 保持遮蔽；仅保留护栏说明和警告计数。

note.en: Included Ren Voss through scene cast selection; Private decoding material stays outside shared scene context.
note.zh-CN: 已因场景登场阵容纳入 任·沃斯；私密解码材料不进入共享场景上下文。

note.en: Departure Bell Timing stays redacted; only the guardrail and warning count remain visible.
note.zh-CN: 发车铃时序 保持遮蔽；仅保留护栏说明和警告计数。

artifacts.title: Planner
artifacts.summary: Planner invocation prepared for scene run execution.

artifacts.title: Writer
artifacts.summary: Writer invocation prepared for scene run execution.

artifacts.title: Scene proposal set
artifacts.summary: Combined planner and writer output is ready for editorial review.

proposals.title: Anchor the arrival beat
proposals.summary: Open on Midnight Platform before introducing any new reveal.

variants.label: Arrival-first
variants.summary: Keep Midnight Platform grounded in the lead character's arrival before escalating the reveal.
variants.rationale: Preserves continuity while still giving the scene a clear forward beat.

variants.label: Reveal pressure
variants.summary: Let the reveal intrude earlier while Midnight Platform is still settling.
variants.rationale: Creates a sharper hook, but asks review to accept a faster continuity turn.

proposals.title: Stage the reveal through the setting
proposals.summary: Let the Midnight Platform setting carry the reveal instead of adding raw exposition.
